items.q: How quickly do you deliver cargo?
items.a: Standard tariff takes 25–35 days, Express tariff takes 7–14 days.

items.q: How can I track my shipment?
items.a: By your order number through online real-time monitoring and personal manager messages.
Yes, all our tariffs include customs clearance.

items.q: What kinds of cargo do you accept?
items.a: Commercial, industrial and special cargo — apart from hazardous — we accept all kinds.
Yes, every shipment is automatically insured.
